title: Just Vanilla Things
description: A lightweight vanilla-style modpack that enhances the Minecraft experience with optimization, minor quality-of-life improvements, and better visuals, while keeping the classic feel!
body:
![jvtmain](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b8c43dde8ba9ea65bfc877325a131a3c82508757.png)
ㅤ

**Just Vanilla Things** elevates the Minecraft experience by blending **cutting-edge optimizations** with **stunning visual enhancements** and **essential quality-of-life features**. It is designed to respect the game's original artistic integrity while removing technical bottlenecks. This pack is built for the modern player: **lightweight, stable, and polished**. Unlike bare-bones optimization packs, JVT breathes new life into your world with **dynamic animations**, **cleaner interfaces**, and **atmospheric details** - all without altering the core gameplay loop. ### Why Choose JVT? - **True to Vanilla:** The classic experience you love, just **smoother, cleaner, and more responsive**. - **Next-Gen Performance:** Achieve **maximum FPS** and faster load times without sacrificing visual fidelity. - **Multiplayer Ready:** Fully compatible with servers, featuring optional tools like **Voice Chat** and **Minimap**. - **Built to Last:** A solid, **customizable foundation** (Fabric based) that lets you safely add your favorite mods. # Experience Enhanced Visuals # Unleash Maximum Performance
